case_title: WONG, KWAI WAN VS. HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, KWAI WAN AS TO DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, KWAI WAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,375.60 PRINCIPAL, $15.62 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,616.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
